description_long: This motorcycle features a classic, minimalist design with a black leather seat and a visible metal frame. The fuel tank is streamlined and painted in a dark color, matching the seat and side panels. The engine is exposed, showing a standard air-cooled configuration with visible exhaust pipes running along the side. The front of the motorcycle is equipped with a round yellow headlight and a small windscreen, while the rear includes a license plate and a single taillight. Both wheels are spoked, with the front wheel slightly larger and fitted with a disc brake. The overall appearance suggests a vintage or custom cafe racer style, suitable for urban commuting.
description: A vintage-style motorcycle with a black leather seat, exposed metal frame, and a round yellow headlight. It has a minimalist, classic design with spoked wheels and a visible engine.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the black seat, taillight, and license plate.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the exposed engine, metal frame, and both wheels.
description_view_2: Front view with the round yellow headlight and small windscreen most prominent.
description_view_3: Angled side view displaying the seat, fuel tank, and kickstand.
